programme.sub-title: London Nanny Seeks Solitude on Vanuatu

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Family of Vets Reset in Beaconsfield, England
programme.desc: Veterinary surgeons give up their custom home and hospital for more family time in Beaconsfield, England; they dream of walking their kids to school in a small English town, but their adjustment from luxurious Texas spaces may be a challenge.

programme.sub-title: Family First in Christchurch, New Zealand

programme.sub-title: Moving for Maori Culture in Hamilton, New Zealand

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Long List of Firsts in Maastricht, the Netherlands
programme.desc: Fueled by visions of a fairy-tale life together, a young Canadian couple is ready to embrace adulthood in Maastricht, the Netherlands; they're facing a daunting list of firsts, and as reality sets in, enduring their first disagreement is a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A London woman gets her dream promotion and looks to move her family abroad to Eindhoven, Netherlands; they intend to live large in their new city, but with three kids and her husband's career in flux, they may have to temper their big expectations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Auckland, New Zealand as a Family Man
programme.desc: After being away for two decades, a California man looks to return with his family to Auckland, New Zealand; he hopes to stay permanently, but to win the whole family over, they'll need to find a spacious home that's close to their children's school.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Say It Ain't Snow in the Bellarine Peninsula
programme.desc: An Ohio family is ready to leave behind the cold for Australia's sunny Bellarine Peninsula; they're on the hunt for an affordable beachside home to ease their kids' transition without straining their budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Complicated Search for the Simple Life in Costa Rica
programme.desc: After a one-time vacation, a young Canadian is ready to leave Montreal for simplicity in Costa Rica; she's looking for a more spiritual and nature-infused life, but realizing her big expectations in the small town of San Mateo may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: New Job, Two Dogs, Second Baby, Forever Paris
programme.desc: A microbiologist lands the job of a lifetime and looks to relocate to Paris; she's eight months pregnant and has a husband, a toddler and two giant dogs, so finding a home to suit everyone before baby number two arrives may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Lucky 13th Move to Cadiz Province, Spain
programme.desc: After moving 12 times during his career, a Navy officer's family faces their first international move to southern Spain; she thinks living near the beach will ease their transition, but he prioritizes a short commute to the base in the Cadiz Province.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Teams have two days to create the ultimate hot tub deck.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Two teams design decks that include a bar.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Two teams build decks with a shade feature.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: A deck geared toward children.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Two teams of professional deck builders face-off against one another to design and build the ultimate deck for barbecuing in two days; Matthew and Joel are Team Black and Dave and Bryan are Team Red.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Two teams of professional deck builders face off against one another as they design and build a garden decking.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to upgrade from their tiny house to an older home located on gifted family property; in a first for Ben and Erin, they decide to bulldoze the place and design a new build tailored to their eclectic, English apothecary style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple lives in a house that once belonged to her grandmother, and with a large family that often visits, they're ready to make big upgrades; Ben and Erin add a much-needed additional bathroom as well as an outdoor kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A woman has completely turned her life around and looks to begin a new chapter with buying her first house; Ben and Erin create a home for her and her son with a big front porch and a laundry room, a luxury she's never had.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A New Jersey couple looks to relocate to Laurel, Mississippi, for the small-town vibes; they've never had a laundry room or a dining room before, so Ben and Erin present them two options with plenty of room for everything on their wish list.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A restoration enthusiast couple wants to raise their two kids in a historic home in Laurel, and they know they'll need to settle on a fixer-upper; Ben and Erin show them two homes, one with bay windows and another with an enticing porch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.sub-title: From Show Goats to Show Stopper
programme.desc: A couple who are longtime Laurel, Miss., business owners purchase a historic building downtown, and they want to convert the upper level into their residence; Ben and Erin are tasked with turning a gymnasium-like space into a luxurious downtown loft.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A civil engineer and artist is moving from Seattle to Laurel, Miss., to be closer to his dad; he has a generous budget and an outdoor hot tub is a non-negotiable; Ben and Erin show him two large houses that suit his modern-contemporary vibe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple decides to move back to their roots in Laurel, Miss.; they're looking for a home with a big lot for outdoor living; Ben and Erin show them a rancher that fits their love of modern rustic design and a home with an enticing in-ground pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The teams are in for a big surprise as they're each tasked with building a whole other building, a bunkie! It's the ultimate test of both building and design skills, as the teams create unique purposes for the extra space that has to feel connected to their main property; Scott & Bryan catch some rays while teams struggle to complete their first build from the ground up; as the competition spreads out, the pressure mounts to finish in time.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.sub-title: Soccer Game, Pirate Map, Japanese Mask
programme.desc: Nigel Havers presides as sellers come face to face with five dealers who battle it out to make the highest bid.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The teams are in for a big surprise as they're each tasked with building a whole other building, a bunkie! programme.title: Life Is Messy

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Alain and Denise are empty nesters looking to spend more time in their backyard, but their existing deck is a safety hazard.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Mary and Lain bought their dream home for its rural surroundings and woodsy feel, but their deck has a septic tank right in the middle.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: When Bryan and Sarah removed their above-ground pool, they quickly realized they were in over their heads when it came to sprucing up the surrounding deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Karen and Justin's kids are old enough to play outside and the family deck is unsafe for three boisterous children.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Tim and Lori are so busy renovating the interior of their house they've severely neglected the exterior, and their deck is suffering.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: M.C. and Dave love throwing huge outdoor parties; the only problem is the deck Dave built.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Sam and Kathleen's son Cole has cerebral palsy and they want to make sure their backyard deck can safely accommodate his independence.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: A few years ago, Sean built a simple platform deck from a how-to manual, but skipped some of the instructions along the way.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The teams are in for a big surprise as they're each tasked with building a whole other building, a bunkie! It's the ultimate test of both building and design skills, as the teams create unique purposes for the extra space that has to feel connected to their main property; Scott & Bryan catch some rays while teams struggle to complete their first build from the ground up; as the competition spreads out, the pressure mounts to finish in time.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Heather and Ian are hanging on by a thread: with two kids under three who don't sleep, and the end of maternity leave around the corner, they are exhausted and living in a constant state of anxiety and frustration; they're so overrun with clutter that their deep soaker tub has become storage; Kortney and Kenny rescue the pair by creating child-safe storage solutions, a custom kitchen pantry to get organized, and a revamped basement with a tub used for baths, not storage.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: After hurriedly agreeing to purchase a spacious, two-story home in her husband's old neighborhood, a woman's misgivings about the house have caught up with her and she's ready for a change.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott & Bryan work on adding value to the property, while the teams take on two small but critical spaces, the front entry and main bathroom. These high-traffic areas demand clever functionality and must make a stellar first impression. It's a designer showdown as Chalon & Tatianna both swing for the fences, Marcy finds herself stretched beyond her comfort zone, and Taylor's indecision explodes into a full-blown wallpaper fiasco!

programme.desc: Kelly and Robin need an expansion for their growing family.
